With reference to the email below and [Regulatory Authority] instructions, [Consultant A] and [Consultant B] will conduct a QA/QC audit of [Client/Office Name] on [Date]. This requirement is mandated by [Regulatory Authority] and is compulsory for commencing work on this project.

Please arrange and confirm the details via email.

**Draft Email:**

Subject: Mandatory QA/QC Audit – [Project Name]

Dear [Recipient Name],

With reference to the correspondence below and the instructions issued by [Regulatory Authority], please be informed that [Consultant A] and [Consultant B] will be conducting a mandatory QA/QC audit at [Client/Office Name] on [Date].

This audit is a strict requirement from [Regulatory Authority] and must be completed before work on this project can commence.

Kindly review the details, make the necessary arrangements, and confirm your availability via reply to this email.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
